name: LayerNorm
description: Layer normalization (mean + variance, used in vanilla transformers and BERT)
code:
_ln{{_id}}_gamma = np.ones({{dim}}, dtype=np.float32)
_ln{{_id}}_beta = np.zeros({{dim}}, dtype=np.float32)
_ln{{_id}}_mean = np.mean({{input}}, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
_ln{{_id}}_var = np.var({{input}}, axis=-1, keepdims=True)
{{output}} = _ln{{_id}}_gamma * ({{input}} - _ln{{_id}}_mean) / np.sqrt(_ln{{_id}}_var + {{eps}}) + _ln{{_id}}_beta
